title: Nursery reflection and copy-budget phase
summary: Lane 2 should hard-cap nursery copy by state and keep plant state, ecological reflection, and reward language as separate authored beats instead of one stacked card.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the nursery copy-budget and state-beat handoff.
execution_order.why_now: Renderer cleanup alone will not fix a page that is trying to say too much.

execution_order.goal: Implement authored per-state nursery copy caps and reflection splits.
execution_order.why_now: The nursery should teach one idea at a time.
The home loop should stay science-forward without crowding the card.

execution_order.goal: Wire the authored copy-role split into the live nursery page helper.
execution_order.why_now: The page players actually see still bypasses the new ready and mature authored beats.

execution_order.goal: Review the live nursery-page copy-role correction.
execution_order.why_now: The phase should not move on to naming cleanup until the live renderer matches the new beat model.

execution_order.goal: Prepare one nursery naming or reward-copy cleanup handoff.
execution_order.why_now: Older reward and label language should not leak back into the now cleaner nursery page.

execution_order.goal: Implement one compact nursery naming or reward-copy cleanup.
execution_order.why_now: A small language cleanup can make the home loop feel more intentional.

execution_order.goal: Review the nursery naming or reward-copy cleanup.
execution_order.why_now: The cleaner home loop should stay readable and coherent.

copy_roles.unlockSummary: Locked or not-yet-ready bed line only.
copy_roles.stageSummaryByStage: Active teaching-bed body copy for stocked, rooting, growing, and mature.
copy_roles.rewardSummary: Route-support or utility consequence only; do not reuse it as mature bed body copy.

state_caps: Locked selection: one unlockSummary sentence only.
Ready selection: one summary sentence only.
Stocked/rooting/growing: one active body sentence only.
Mature: one active body sentence plus one optional memory footer sentence only.
verification: Seeded nursery browser proof covering inactive, active-growing, and active-mature states

main_279_focus.ready_state_rule: Affordable ready selected beds should show `summary` in the bed body; not-yet-ready states may use `unlockSummary` or a compact supply fallback only.
main_279_focus.mature_state_rule: Selected mature beds should show `stageSummaryByStage.mature` in the body and `memorySummary` in the footer when present, with `ENTER clears the bed.` only as the no-memory fallback.
guardrails: Do not widen the nursery shell or add another text row.
Do not move start-cost or planting CTA back into the teaching-bed body.
Add one focused render-level or runtime assertion so the live nursery page cannot drift away from authored copy roles again.

main_274_focus.target_family: Unlock summaries that still use fully retired route-facing labels.
guardrails: Do not rename crowberry's `Short Season` unlock summary in this pass; the filed-note identity is still intentionally stable there.
Do not retune rewardTitle or rewardSummary in this pass.
Prefer a focused nursery or ready-bed assertion over broader station-page churn.
Do not widen route-board or station copy.
Prefer one compact sentence per beat over stacked explanation.
Do not add new nursery facts just to fill space.
